content: 2024-2025 cutting-edge active learning agent memory systems can be structured as a recursive hierarchy of nested sub-agents, where each sub-agent acts as a curiosity-driven active memory slot that selectively prioritizes encoding new information based on its own intrinsic reward signal. This recursive framing reframes monolithic agent memory not as a static storage bank, but as a distributed collective of tiny active learning agents that self-organize to retain high-uncertainty, high-value information.
